subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Shouldst thou arise, as befitting and worthy, to serve at the threshold of the All-Glorious through the attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله اگر چنانچه باید و شاید بکنیزی درگاه کبریاء قیام نماای یعنی بصفات
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @firmness in the Covenant
